data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

OKG Technology Holdings Limited ( (HK:1499) ) has issued an announcement.

OKG Technology Holdings Limited, a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, announced that all resolutions proposed at its Annual General Meeting (AGM) held on September 5, 2025, were approved by shareholders via poll. The resolutions included the adoption of financial statements, reappointment of Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu as auditor, re-election of directors, and granting the board authority to issue additional shares. The unanimous approval of these resolutions reflects strong shareholder support and positions the company for continued stability and potential growth.

data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Truecaller AB Class B ( ($SE:TRUE.B) ) has issued an announcement.

The Swedish Authority for Privacy Protection (IMY) has dismissed a claim against Truecaller regarding a breach of GDPR, following an investigation into the company’s data practices. This outcome reinforces Truecaller’s commitment to data privacy and integrity, as no enforcement actions or penalties were imposed, potentially strengthening its reputation and trust among stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on ($SE:TRUE.B) stock is a Hold with a SEK50.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Truecaller AB Class B stock, see the SE:TRUE.B Stock Forecast page.

More about Truecaller AB Class B

Truecaller AB Class B is a leading global platform specializing in verifying contacts and blocking unwanted communication, aiming to facilitate safe and efficient interactions between individuals and businesses. The company is particularly focused on combating fraud and unwanted communication in digital economies, especially within emerging markets, and serves over 450 million active users worldwide. Truecaller is listed on Nasdaq Stockholm since October 2021.

data.title: Aris Mining Reports Successful Ramp-Up at Segovia Operations
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Aris Mining ( (TSE:ARIS) ) has shared an update.

Aris Mining Corporation announced a successful ramp-up at its Segovia Operations following the commissioning of a second mill in June 2025, which increased processing capacity by 50%. This expansion has led to a significant rise in mill throughput and gold production, with milling rates averaging 2,415 tonnes per day in July and August. The company remains on track to meet its full-year 2025 production guidance of 230,000 to 275,000 ounces of gold. This development enhances Aris Mining’s operational capabilities and strengthens its position in the gold mining industry, benefiting stakeholders by potentially increasing revenue and market share.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:ARIS) stock is a Buy with a C$17.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Aris Mining stock, see the TSE:ARIS Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:ARIS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:ARIS is a Outperform.

Aris Mining’s strong financial performance and positive earnings call sentiment are major strengths, supported by bullish technical indicators. However, the high P/E ratio suggests potential overvaluation, which slightly offsets the positive aspects.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:ARIS stock, click here.

More about Aris Mining

Aris Mining Corporation, founded in September 2022, is a gold mining company focused on Latin America. The company operates two underground gold mines in Colombia, the Segovia Operations and the Marmato Complex, and is expanding its production capabilities. Aris Mining is listed on the TSX and NYSE-A and is involved in several projects, including the Soto Norte joint venture and the Toroparu gold/copper project in Guyana.

Unidata S.P.A. ( (IT:UD) ) has shared an update.

Unidata S.p.A. announced a change in the total number of voting rights associated with its ordinary shares. The update reflects a decrease of 16,048 voting rights due to changes in the company’s share structure, impacting the number of shares with increased voting rights. This adjustment may influence shareholder dynamics and voting power distribution within the company.

Unidata S.p.A. is a telecommunications, cloud, and IoT services operator founded in 1985. It operates a fiber optic network of approximately 7,800 km, a wireless network, and a proprietary data center, providing ultra-broadband connectivity services, VoIP, cloud services, and IoT solutions to over 28,600 customers. data.title: CG Oncology Announces Promising Phase 3 Trial Results
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

CG Oncology, Inc. ( (CGON) ) has shared an announcement.

On September 5, 2025, CG Oncology announced updated data from its Phase 3 BOND-003 Cohort C trial, showing a 24-month complete response rate of 41.8% for cretostimogene monotherapy in high-risk non-muscle invasive bladder cancer patients unresponsive to BCG treatment. The trial demonstrated strong durability and tolerability, with no severe treatment-related adverse events reported, and 96.6% of patients were free from progression to muscle invasive disease at 24 months. The company plans to submit a Biologics License Application for cretostimogene in the fourth quarter of 2025, positioning it as a potential breakthrough treatment in this patient population.

The most recent analyst rating on (CGON) stock is a Hold with a $28.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on CG Oncology, Inc. stock, see the CGON Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CGON Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CGON is a Neutral.

CG Oncology, Inc. has a moderate stock score driven by positive technical indicators and a stable financial foundation despite ongoing financial challenges. The lack of revenue and reliance on external funding are significant risks, but the stock’s current bullish momentum provides some optimism.

To see Spark’s full report on CGON stock, click here.

More about CG Oncology, Inc.

CG Oncology is a late-stage clinical biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing innovative bladder-sparing therapeutics for bladder cancer patients. The company aims to enhance the quality of life for urologic cancer patients through its immunotherapies.

Average Trading Volume: 818,055

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.description:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

The latest update is out from Ensurge Micropower ( (ENMPF) ).

Ensurge Micropower ASA has announced the issuance of 405,000 new shares due to the exercise of vested incentive subscription rights under its 2022 and 2023 Subscription Rights Plans, as well as 1,629,232 new shares in connection with its 2025 Employee Share Purchase Plan. This increase in share capital, now registered in the Register of Business Enterprises, reflects the company’s strategic efforts to enhance its financial standing and expand its market presence, potentially benefiting stakeholders and reinforcing its position in the microbattery industry.

More about Ensurge Micropower

Ensurge Micropower is a company that specializes in the development of ultrathin, flexible, and reliable solid-state lithium microbatteries. These microbatteries are designed for applications with limited space such as hearables, digital and health wearables, sports and fitness devices, and IoT sensor solutions. The company operates a state-of-the-art manufacturing facility in Silicon Valley and is listed on the Norwegian stock exchange, with financial backing from reputable investors in Norway.

data.title: ABM Industries Reports Strong Q3 Results and Restructuring
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

The latest announcement is out from ABM Industries ( (ABM) ).

On September 5, 2025, ABM Industries announced its fiscal third-quarter results, highlighting a 6.2% revenue increase to $2.2 billion, driven by organic growth and acquisitions. The company reported a significant rise in net income to $41.8 million, attributed to the absence of prior year adjustments and lower corporate costs. ABM launched a restructuring program aimed at achieving $35 million in annualized cost savings, expected to begin in the fourth quarter. The Board also approved a $150 million increase in share repurchase authorization, reflecting confidence in ABM’s strategic direction. Despite some margin pressures, the company anticipates improved fourth-quarter results and continues to invest in AI capabilities and client-facing resources.
